channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][开播] Anime News Network 动画 Expo 2026 Hosts U.S 开播 Jaadugar: A Witch Mongolia 动画, Junya Enoki, Hana Hishikawa, Makoto Furukawa, More Guests
